branch.frontier_task_title: Define v5.0 governed runtime priorities after the Human Recognition Interface release
branch.branch_summary: Choose the narrowest v5.0 slice that keeps one-screen human recognition truthful while turning governed workforce semantics into stronger live allocation and escalation judgment.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-047 sits on v5.0 after shipped v4.0.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Define the first post-v4.0 frontier that preserves the Human Recognition Interface contract while making governed workforce runtime decisions more operationally decisive.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-047: Define v5.0 governed runtime priorities after the Human Recognition Interface release
